title: Number Base Converter
seoDescription: Free online number base converter. Convert between decimal, binary, hexadecimal, and octal instantly. Perfect for programmers and students.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the Base Converter
step1Desc: Type a number in any supported base.
step2Desc: All four bases update instantly as you type.
step3Desc: Click any value to copy it to your clipboard.
faq2A: The conversion is exact up to JavaScript's integer precision (safe up to 2^53).
faq3Q: Can I convert from any base?
faq3A: Yes, you can enter a number in any base and all others update automatically.
